zh.Retreat, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可雷特亞特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Latham於1286年3月10日出生在英國藍卡爾蘭卡斯特時，她的父親Sir Robert de Lathom II45歲，母親Katherine Knowsley38歲。她於大約1274年與William de Holand of Sharples在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國素福爾可雷特亞特。

zh-hans.Retreat, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可雷特亞特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Latham于1286年3月10日出生在英国藍卡爾蘭卡斯特时，她的父亲Sir Robert de Lathom II45岁，母亲Katherine Knowsley38岁。她于大约1274年与William de Holand of Sharples在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国素福爾可雷特亞特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Latham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lathom in Lancashire, or occasionally perhaps from Laytham in Yorkshire. The placenames mean ‘at the barns’, from hlǫthum, the dative plural form of Old Norse hlatha ‘barn, store house’.

variants.name: Laden
meanings: German: from a shortened form of Ladengast ‘invite the guest’, a nickname for an innkeeper.
German: from von der Laden, a nickname for a joiner or for the keeper of a shrine or the chest of a guild, from Middle Low German lade ‘chest’.

variants.name: Lathan
meanings: English (mainly northeastern counties): variant of   Latham  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Latham was born on 10 March 1286, in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Robert de Lathom II, was 45 and her mother, Katherine Knowsley, was 38. She married William de Holand of Sharples about 1274, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She was buried in Retreat, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Latham est née le 10 mars 1286, à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Lathom II, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Katherine Knowsley, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé William de Holand of Sharples environ 1274, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elleenterrée à Retreat, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Latham am 10. März 1286 in Lancaster, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert de Lathom II 45 und ihre Mutter Katherine Knowsley 38. Sie hat um 1274 in Lancashire, England William de Holand of Sharples geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie wurde in Retreat, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Latham è nata il il 10 marzo 1286 nel Lancaster, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert de Lathom II, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Katherine Knowsley, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato William de Holand of Sharples circa 1274, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Fu sepolta a Retreat, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Lathamが1286年3月10日にイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Lathom IIは45歳，母Katherine Knowsleyは38歳であった。約1274年にイギリスランカシュアイアでWilliam de Holand of Sharplesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリススフォルクレトレアトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Latham(이)가 1286년 3월 10일 영국 랭카실르 랭커스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Lathom II(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Knowsley(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 대략 1274년 영국 랭카실르에서 William de Holand of Sharples(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 수폴크 레트리트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Latham nasceu em 10 de março de 1286, em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Lathom II, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Knowsley, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Holand of Sharples aproximadamente 1274, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela foi sepultada em Retreat, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Latham родилась 10 марта 1286 г. в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Lathom II было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Knowsley, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Holand of Sharples около 1274 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она была похоронена в местности ретрит, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Latham nació el 10 de marzo de 1286, en Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert de Lathom II, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Katherine Knowsley, tenía 38 años. Se casó con William de Holand of Sharples aproximadamente 1274, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Fue sepultada en Retreat, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
